metrics.f2: F-beta (beta=2): weights recall 4x over precision — penalises missed gates heavily
metrics.gate_recall: Of gates that should fire, how many did? (1.0 = no missed gates)
metrics.gate_precision: Of gates that fired, how many were correct? (1.0 = no false alarms)
metrics.false_negatives: Missed a gate that should fire (dangerous)
metrics.false_positives: Fired a gate that shouldn't (conservative but wrong)
metrics.dimension_match: Exact level match vs reference across all 7 dimensions
metrics.differentiation: % of dimensions where CO/CRO/Ops personalities disagree
metrics.bias: Error bias direction: where FN >> FP the model under-detects risk (sleepy); where FP >> FN it over-triggers (jittery); balanced means errors go both ways; calibrated means few errors overall

bias_labels.calibrated: Calibrated — few errors in either direction
bias_labels.sleepy: Sleepy alarm — misses real risks (high FN, low FP)
bias_labels.jittery: Jittery alarm — over-triggers on safe scenarios (high FP, low FN)
